subcodes.first_line: O ye who are near, O ye who are attracted, O ye who are enkindled with the fire of God's love in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المقربون ایها المنجذبون ایها المشتعلون بنار محبه الله فی هذا الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @music and singing
